title: QA Engineer
responsibilities: create and maintain test cases; automate regression and smoke checks; document defects and collaborate with engineering teams
requirements_text: We are looking for a junior specialist with hands-on experience in testing, jira, sql, postman, test automation. Strong communication and delivery ownership are expected.
benefits: Flexible schedule, paid vacation, learning budget, mentorship, and access to modern tooling.
summary: CoreStack is hiring a junior qa engineer to support validating product quality through manual and automated testing.
raw_text: Vacancy V046: QA Engineer at CoreStack. Location: Odesa. Employment: full-time. Required experience: 1.7 years. Required skills: testing, jira, sql, postman, test automation, selenium. Optional skills: mobile testing, ci/cd. Responsibilities: create and maintain test cases; automate regression and smoke checks; document defects and collaborate with engineering teams.
